title: Silent Caves
description: New cave horror mod concept with a camouflaging mob (WIP)
body:
New cave horror mod concept with a camouflaging mob (WIP)

This mod adds a new Silencing Golem entity that will stalk you in the caves. WIP mod based on concept by u/alex_pufferfish on reddit [Reddit Link](https://www.reddit.com/r/MinecraftMemes/comments/1s6r4rb/had_a_dream_this_was_added_to_minecraft_was/) about a 3 block tall camouflaging golem that spawns underground and mutes sounds as the player gets closer.

This is a WIP mod and will receive some updates over the coming weeks; the initial 1.0.0 "evil_stone_guy" is just the "alpha" that I was promising on Reddit. 

If you're a modeler/animator please leave a comment. I'm re-writing the mod from the ground up now and it will be open source soon.

Developed for 1.21.1 Fabric and NeoForge (no dependencies)

1.1.0 - New model and animations by yomai68 (Discord)
